summary: Iteration 12 testing completed. All features verified: Beats API CRUD operations (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), Instrumentals page loads beats from API, Login/Register pages have purple-pink gradient background, Registration form has all required fields (legal name, stage name, email, password, confirm password, country picker, state, town, post code, role toggle), Back button visible on non-home pages. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns healthy status
GET /api/beats returns list of seeded demo beats
GET /api/beats?genre=Trap filters by genre
GET /api/beats/{beat_id} returns single beat
GET /api/beats/{invalid_id} returns 404
POST /api/beats requires authentication (401)
POST /api/beats as admin creates beat successfully
PUT /api/beats/{id} requires authentication (401)
PUT /api/beats/{id} as admin updates beat successfully
DELETE /api/beats/{id} requires authentication (401)
DELETE /api/beats/{id} as admin deletes beat successfully
DELETE /api/beats/{invalid_id} returns 404
POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials succeeds
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
POST /api/auth/register creates new user with all fields
POST /api/auth/register with duplicate email fails
Frontend: Instrumentals page loads and shows 9 beats from API
Frontend: Beat Catalog section visible with play buttons
Frontend: License tiers (Basic, Premium, Unlimited, Exclusive) displayed
Frontend: Beat request form visible
Frontend: Login page has purple-pink gradient background
Frontend: Login page has all elements (email, password, submit, forgot password, signup link, Google login)
Frontend: Register page has purple-pink gradient background
Frontend: Register page has all fields (legal name, stage name, email, password, confirm password, country picker, state, town, post code, role toggle, terms checkbox)
Frontend: Registration flow creates account successfully and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Admin login redirects to dashboard with Admin Panel link visible
Frontend: Homepage has no back button (hamburger menu on left)
Frontend: Pricing page has back button on left, title centered, hamburger on right
seed_data_creation: Test beats created during testing (TEST_Beat_*, TEST_Update_*, TEST_Delete_*), Test user created (test_95dee64f@example.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 12 features verified working: Beats API with full CRUD operations (public GET, admin-only POST/PUT/DELETE), Instrumentals page fetches and displays beats from database, Login/Register pages have purple-pink gradient backgrounds, Registration form includes all mobile app fields (legal name, stage name, email, password, confirm password, country picker, state, town, post code, role toggle). Demo beats are seeded on startup (6 beats: Midnight Drip, Golden Hour, City Lights, Lagos Nights, Sunday Morning, Neon Dreams). Audio URLs are null for seeded beats (no audio files uploaded). Previous test files: iteration_1 through iteration_11.

mocked_apis.PayPal: Runs in sandbox simulation mode - no API keys configured
mocked_apis.Resend Email: Email sending is skipped (no API key) but password reset tokens are stored in DB

beats_api.list_beats: GET /api/beats returns seeded demo beats with genre/mood filtering
beats_api.create_beat: POST /api/beats (admin only) creates new beat with prices
beats_api.delete_beat: DELETE /api/beats/{id} (admin only) removes beat from catalog
beats_api.audio_upload: POST /api/beats/{id}/audio (admin only) uploads audio to Object Storage

instrumentals_page.beats_display: Shows beats from /api/beats with play buttons
instrumentals_page.beat_request_form: Custom beat request form with genre/mood selection

login_page.form_elements: Email, password, submit button, forgot password link, signup link, Google login

register_page.all_fields: Legal name, stage name, email, password, confirm password, country picker, state, town, post code, role toggle (artist/producer), terms checkbox

back_button.homepage: No back button - hamburger menu on left, KALMORI logo centered
back_button.other_pages: Back arrow on left, page title centered, hamburger on right
